data.title: Canada suggests banning crypto donations to prevent foreign interference; a prior bill in 2024 failed to pass, leading to its demise.
data.description: A bill with similar provisions was put forward in 2024, but it did not progress beyond the second reading in the House of Commons. Unfortunately, the bill failed to become law and was ultimately abandoned.

data.title: Tamarack Resort Hosts Two Weekends of High-Energy RMSHA Races
data.description: Tamarack Resort in TAMARACK, Idaho, hosted the Rocky Mountain States Hill Climb Association (RMSHA) competition over two weekends in March 2026. The event featured elite snowmobile athletes showcasing their skills on the mountain. Spectators had the opportunity to view the action from lift-served viewing areas, providing an immersive experience. The event attracted a significant number of participants and attendees, contributing to the resort's vibrant winter sports atmosphere.

data.title: REPATHA® CUTS RISK OF FIRST MAJOR CARDIOVASCULAR EVENTS BY 31% IN HIGH-RISK PATIENTS WITHOUT KNOWN SIGNIFICANT ATHEROSCLEROSIS
data.description: In a recent study, Repatha stands out as the sole PCSK9 Inhibitor that notably diminishes the likelihood of initial cardiovascular events. The VESALIUS-CV subgroup highlights the advantages of starting Repatha sooner in high-risk individuals, resulting in a median reduction of 44 mg/dL in LDL-C levels. These findings underscore the importance of early intervention with Repatha for high-risk patients.

data.title: Washington AG sues Kalshi, claiming prediction markets broke state laws. Another legal woe for the company.
data.description: On Friday, the Attorney General of Washington filed a lawsuit against Kalshi, accusing the prediction markets platform of breaching state regulations. This legal action adds to the growing number of states challenging Kalshi's operations.

data.title: Biogen Announces Second Positive Phase 2 Litifilimab Trial in Cutaneous Lupus Erythematosus at 2026 American Academy of Dermatology Annual Meeting, Showing a Significant Reduction in Skin Disease Activity
data.description: Biogen Inc. has revealed promising outcomes from the Phase 2 component of the AMETHYST Phase 2/3 trial (Part A) of litifilimab for individuals coping with cutaneous lupus erythematosus (CLE). This marks a significant development as litifilimab, a humanized IgG1 monoclonal antibody targeting BDCA2, could potentially be the first groundbreaking treatment approved for CLE in seven decades. Part A of AMETHYST analyzed litifilimab's effectiveness and safety up to week 24, showing decreases in skin disease activity based on various assessments. These findings align with the favorable results from the previous Phase 2 LILAC study published in The New England Journal of Medicine. The Phase 2 outcomes from both LILAC and AMETHYST were influential in litifilimab receiving the recently bestowed U.S. FDA Breakthrough Therapy Designation. The results are currently being disclosed at the American Academy of Dermatology (AAD) Annual Meeting.

data.title: New England Journal of Medicine Publishes Positive Phase 3 VALOR Trial Results of Brepocitinib in Dermatomyositis
data.description: In Durham, North Carolina, on March 28, 2026, Priovant Therapeutics released news about the Phase 3 VALOR trial results in the New England Journal of Medicine. Priovant, a biotechnology company, specializes in autoimmune disease treatments. The trial studied brepocitinib’s effectiveness in adults with dermatomyositis. The publication underscores its focus on developing targeted therapies. The announcement reflects the company's commitment to advancing research in the medical field.

data.title: MoonLake announces Week 40 Results from its Phase 3 Clinical Trials of Sonelokimab in Hidradenitis Suppurativa at the 2026 AAD Annual Meeting
data.description: MoonLake Immunotherapeutics, a biotechnology company, revealed long-term Week 40 results of Phase 3 VELA-1 and VELA-2 trials within its global program for patients with moderate-to-severe HS. The company, listed as NASDAQ: MLTX, focuses on innovative inflammatory disease treatments. The presentation of this data is scheduled at the 2026 American Academy of Dermatology Annual Meeting. The trials mark significant progress in the company's research efforts.

data.title: SonarRoom: New iPhone App Reveals the Hidden Acoustic Problems Destroying Your Audio -- 3D Room Mapping Technology Once Reserved for Professional Studios
data.description: The innovative iOS app, SonarRoom, revolutionizes room acoustics analysis by turning an iPhone into a high-quality analyzer. Through augmented reality and live audio monitoring, it creates a detailed 3D acoustic layout of a room in less than four minutes. This map exposes common issues like standing waves, bass irregularities, and echo problems, providing users with comprehensive insights for improving their audio environments.

data.title: Firma.dev Launches Firma 12 With Full AI Integration, Becoming the First E-Signature Platform You Can Operate Entirely Through AI
data.description: The latest e-signature API offers envelopes for just €0.029 each. This innovative service includes dual MCP servers and a remarkable 84 AI tools designed for documentation and real-time data processing. Users can effortlessly send, monitor, and handle signing requests through popular AI tools like Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and other MCP-compatible platforms. Interestingly, no coding skills are necessary to utilize this cost-effective solution.

data.title: NPR Tiny Desk Winner The Philharmonik Hits 50% Spotify Growth in 30 Days -- Proof That Real Artist Development Still Works
data.description: The Philharmonik, winner of NPR's 2024 Tiny Desk Contest with 2 million views, experienced a 50% surge in Spotify monthly listeners within just 30 days due to organic algorithmic growth. His track "Which Side You're On" achieved its highest streaming day ever. The artist's upcoming EP "Transcendentalism" is scheduled for release on March 27, featuring music inspired by Nina.

data.title: Team Clermont and Classic City Rotary Announce the 2026 10th Annual Vic Chesnutt Songwriter of the Year Awards April 23, 8:00p.m., Morton Theatre, Athens, Georgia.
data.description: Team Clermont is excited to reveal the upcoming event: the 10th Annual Vic Chesnutt Songwriter of the Year Awards, hosted by Classic City Rotary, will take place on April 23rd at 8:00 p.m. at the Morton Theatre in Athens, Georgia. This prestigious event is set to honor talented songwriters. Mark your calendars for this special occasion.

data.title: Market Synergy Group Announces the Addition of Carrie Freeburg as Partner
data.description: Topeka, Kansas - As of March 28, 2026, Market Synergy Group, Inc. has further enhanced its growth by welcoming Carrie Freeburg, an experienced professional in product development and marketing, to their team. This strategic move is aimed at capitalizing on Freeburg's industry expertise to drive the company's progress. This recent addition reflects Market Synergy Group's commitment to sustained expansion and development.

data.title: UNLTD x Peanuts® Returns for Spring with New Lacrosse Collection
data.description: UNLTD has revealed the launch of their new collaboration, UNLTD x Peanuts®, for Spring. This marks the second collaboration and the fourth overall release of this popular partnership. Following the success of the Black Friday 2025 debut, the new collection focuses on Spring lacrosse.

data.title: 10M grill brushes recalled due to loose bristles. 5 cases reported of ingesting bristles, requiring medical attention.
data.description: A federal agency reported that in a minimum of five instances, customers required medical assistance to extract bristles "from either their digestive tract or throat."

data.title: 10M grill brushes recalled due to loose bristles, posing ingestion risk. 5 cases reported requiring medical attention.
data.description: According to a federal agency, customers have sought medical help in at least five instances due to the need to remove bristles from their digestive tract or throat.

data.title: Phase 3b data presented at AAD Annual Meeting show Lilly's Taltz (ixekizumab) plus Zepbound (tirzepatide) delivered superior efficacy for adults with psoriatic arthritis and obesity
data.description: In a recent study titled TOGETHER-PsA, the combined use of Taltz and Zepbound demonstrated significant enhancements in disease activity and patient-reported outcomes when compared to Taltz used alone. The findings were released as late-breaking results and featured in Arthritis & Rheumatology. The study was conducted in Indianapolis and the results were made public on March 28, 2026.

data.title: NYU Langone Heart Cardiologists Present Latest Clinical Findings and Research at ACC.2026
data.description: In New York on March 28, 2026, cardiologists from NYU Langone Heart will be unveiling their recent clinical discoveries and research at the prestigious American College of Cardiology's Annual Scientific Session, ACC.26, taking place from March 28 to 30 in New Orleans. The presentations will cover various topics, including early-stage interventions and advancements in cardiovascular care. This event will gather experts and professionals in the field, with an expected attendance of over 10,000 participants, making it a significant platform for sharing groundbreaking insights and innovations in cardiology.

data.title: North America Water Pump Market Forecast to Reach USD 15 Billion by 2032, Reports MarkNtel Advisors
data.description: On March 28, 2026, a market study by MarkNtel Advisors revealed projections for the North America Water Pump Market, estimating a growth of approximately 3.93% at a compound annual growth rate between 2026 and 2032. This expansion is largely due to rising investments in water infrastructure and related sectors.

data.title: UK Soft Gelatin Capsules Market to Reach USD 408.07 Million by 2032, Growing at a CAGR of 5.8% During 2026-2032 | MarkNtel Advisors
data.description: A recent report by MarkNtel Advisors predicts that the Soft Gelatin Capsules Market in the United Kingdom will experience a growth rate of 5.8% between 2026 and 2032. This growth is largely attributed to the rising demand for these capsules.

data.title: Dual Imaging Identifies Cause of Heart Attack in Patients Without Blocked Arteries
data.description: A study led by NYU Langone and presented at ACC.26 advocates for utilizing advanced imaging techniques to improve diagnosis and treatment. The research involved a patient named Ashley Perlow, who experienced a sudden intense pain in her chest and wrists. The study emphasizes the importance of combining advanced imaging tools for better patient care. This initiative highlights the potential benefits of integrating imaging technologies in healthcare, emphasizing the value of comprehensive diagnostic approaches. The study was showcased at ACC.26 on March 28, 2026.
